method: Per-directory batch comparison plus individual baseline reruns for Admin/Jetpk/Ui spot-checks; zero asymmetric failure test names across all 23 Feature directories.

notes.Client: Integration has more tests (95 vs 77) and fewer failures (45 vs 52); all integration failure test names exist in baseline batch failures.
notes.Ui: 22 MobileViewPreference failures are EXPECTED_ARCHITECTURE_CHANGE (home Strategy 1 / mobile_pages.home=false); identical on both SHAs.
